name: 500 MG Doripenem For Injection
about: 500 MG Doripenem For Injection is a high-quality medicine manufactured in India. It is an injection drug type with a dosage of 500 MG. This injection is used to treat severe bacterial infections such as pneumonia, urinary tract infections, and abdominal infections. The physical form of this injection is liquid, and it should be stored in a dry place. Doripenem works by inhibiting the growth and spread of bacteria in the body. This medicine is widely used in hospitals and clinics to treat infections caused by resistant bacteria.
